name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, payroll tax filing inconsistencies cause compliance penalties. We cross-validate payroll tax filings with internal records instead of manual reconciliation.
problem_solved: Inconsistencies between payroll tax filings and internal payroll records.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistencies between payroll tax filings and internal payroll records.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, payroll tax filing inconsistencies cause compliance penalties. We cross-validate payroll tax filings with internal records instead of manual reconciliation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of payroll records and tax filings

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, payroll tax filing inconsistencies cause compliance penalties. We cross-validate payroll tax filings with internal records instead of manual reconciliation.
